prompt: Flat minimal macOS UI design mockup in the visual style of the Reporter app by Nicholas Felton: full-bleed solid color background filling the entire image edge to edge, one question per screen, large quiet grotesque sans-serif typography (like SF Pro), white and semi-transparent white text, no gradients, no drop shadows, no cards, no window chrome, no menu bar, no decoration, no illustration, no photographic elements, generous negative space. A precise flat UI screenshot. Solid deep teal (#0E7C6B) background. Tiny dim uppercase caption top center: 'CHECK-IN — 2 OF 3'. Very large white question centered: 'What pulled at your attention?'. Below it one row of four pill-shaped chips with thin white outlines, transparent fill and white labels: 'People', 'Notifications', 'My own thoughts', 'Nothing'. Bottom center three small pagination dots: second dot solid white, first and third semi-transparent.
